description: Create a content slide with the headline about Moore's law and quantum computing, using a three-column capability matrix with sector and application bullets plus a right-hand sidebar.

header.headline: Moore's law predicted the computing power of today's computers – Quantum computing reveals future spheres of computational power

rows: Machine learning; Material science; Risk / portfolio management; Route optimization

sidebar.body: Quantum computing is advancing beyond the limits implied by Moore's law, with higher qubit counts unlocking interest across more industries and enabling increasingly sophisticated applications.
